center.name: 季風雨林
center.summary: 季風雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括眼斑孔雀雉、Black cuckoo-dove、Timor green pigeon等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits primary and secondary monsoon forest, eucalyptus forest, and woodlands

birds.evidence: It inhabits primary forest, monsoon forest, and secondary forest with tall trees in lowlands, occurring up to altitudes of

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also found on some of the islands of the Bonaparte Archipelago. It is found most commonly in monsoon forest and in adjacent vine-scrub and gallery forest, and also occurs in eucalypt forest, bamboo forests, paperbark forest and scrub, Lophostemon forests and the edges of mangrove forests (but never in mangrove forests themselves)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the seasonal tropical forests of mid-southern Vietnam and far eastern Cambodia; it can be found readily in Cat Tien National Park
